current_suggestion.pitch: You have Renaissance Periodization but Mike Israetel also runs his personal channel with more informal, longer discussions that go deeper into training philosophy and dietary flexibility debates—including his critiques of strict carnivore from a bodybuilding perspective. He steelmans moderate-carb approaches with actual mechanistic arguments rather than dogma, which balances your current low-carb-heavy feed. Format is solo talking-head and casual conversations, often 20-45 minutes, more exploratory than the polished RP content.
